title: Philemon and Baucis scene I | Roots and Wings | Class 6th English Literature | Explanation in Hindi
description:
In Ovid's moralizing fable which stands on the periphery of Greek mythology, Baucis and Philemon were an old married couple in the region of Tyana, which Ovid places in Phrygia, and the only ones in their town to welcome disguised gods Zeus and Hermes.
